description: Narrow read-only Windows registry checks for basic security indicators.

checks.title: Remote Desktop NLA Setting Indicator
checks.recommendation: Require Network Level Authentication for RDP where RDP is enabled.
checks.limitation: This registry value is an indicator and should be interpreted with RDP exposure and policy context.

checks.title: Remote Desktop Disabled Indicator
checks.recommendation: Disable RDP where it is not required and restrict access where it is approved.
checks.limitation: This registry value is an indicator; RDP service exposure should also be checked through port 3389.

checks.title: SMBv1 Server Disabled Indicator
checks.recommendation: Disable SMBv1 server support unless a documented business exception exists.
checks.limitation: Missing value may require contextual interpretation depending on Windows version.

checks.title: Local Security Authority Protection Indicator
checks.recommendation: Enable LSA protection where supported and validated by organisational policy.
checks.limitation: Availability depends on Windows version and enterprise policy.

checks.title: WDigest UseLogonCredential Indicator
checks.recommendation: Keep WDigest UseLogonCredential disabled unless a documented exception exists.
checks.limitation: Missing value may indicate default secure behaviour on modern Windows.
